title: Investigate graph dashboard episode count bug
summary:
The service is running (redirects to login as expected — the endpoint is auth-gated). The fix is deployed.

---

Here is a summary of everything found and done:

**Root Cause**

In `/home/clungus/work/terminal/server.py`, the `ingestion_status_handler` function had a hardcoded constant `TOTAL_EPISODES = 141`. This was the expected number of Discord history episodes at the time the ingestion feature was built.
